The modern diapering essentials

Coterie exists to give you a premium diapering experience. Our high-performing products are dermatologist tested, hypoallergenic, independent lab tested, and cruelty free.

MONTHLY SUPPLY OF PREMIUM DIAPERS

Subscriber exclusive benefits

Save 10% on every order
First-order free trial pack of next size + personalized sizing nudges
Expedite, delay, or cancel via text
24/7 concierge customer service to answer all your questions
Single packs sent ASAP to your home or domestic vacation destination
Shop The DiaperShop The Pant

Designed to perform

We're a team of parents and engineers who set out to make a diaper that really works—one that's supremely soft and minimizes the likelihood of leaks, blowouts, and diaper rash. For baby's comfort and your peace of mind.

Shop The Diaper

Held to high safety standards

We go above and beyond for our babies and yours. For us, that means sourcing hypoallergenic, apparel-grade materials. We work with independent labs for safety testing, and publish the results for transparency.

Read our Safety Reports
